items.title: Improve app_connectivity
items.rationale: 85% of negative reviews mention issues with app connectivity, which is the most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Enhance setup process
items.rationale: 81% of negative reviews mention difficulties with setup, which is the second most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Address customer service concerns
items.rationale: 36% of negative reviews mention poor customer service, which is a significant concern for customers.

items.title: Investigate battery life issues
items.rationale: 6% of negative reviews mention battery life concerns, which may be a significant pain point for customers.

items.title: Improve compatibility with other devices
items.rationale: 16% of negative reviews mention compatibility issues, which may be a concern for customers with specific device configurations.
